title: hyptis orbiculata
intro: Hyptis orbiculata, also known as Brazilian pennyroyal, is a tropical plant native to South America and belongs to the Lamiaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits associated with Hyptis orbiculata include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
